About the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences

Aim of the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences

The main purpose of Üsküdar University Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences is to organize graduate education in the field of Forensic Sciences at Üsküdar University, to direct graduate studies and projects by following scientific and technological developments, to direct its students to advanced research on current issues, and to meet the basic needs of our country in the fields of justice services, addiction and crime prevention.

Vision of the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences

The Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences, which has an important place in the postgraduate education and research activities of Üsküdar University, which is one of the most distinguished educational institutions of Turkey in the age of science, continues its efforts to train the scientists of our future and criminalists serving justice with its distinguished scientific staff. Our Institute operates in the light of the principles determined in accordance with the vision and mission determined by our University.

Education at the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences

Students enrolled in the Graduate School continue their courses, projects, seminars and thesis studies in accordance with the regulations they are affiliated with. Students must complete their graduate education within the period specified in the regulations they are affiliated with.
